---
title: "Dataset Excluded"
output: html_document
params:
  file_name: "unknown"
  report_date: "unknown"
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
htmltools::HTML(sprintf(
  "<div style='padding:1em; background-color:#f8d7da; color:#721c24; border-radius:5px;'>
  <strong>⚠️ Dataset '%s' has been marked as 'not included'</strong><br>
  No quality control report was generated.
  </div>",
  params$file_name
))
